meta.title: Projects: Full-Stack & AI Engineering Work
meta.description: Selected full-stack, AI automation, and open-source projects — production web systems, LLM agents, Claude Code plugins, MCP servers, and experimental ML tooling.

header.title: Projects
header.description: A selection of technical explorations, open-source modules, and experimental systems built with a focus on performance and architectural clarity.

projects.title: claude-human-review
projects.description: Claude Code plugin that reviews every edit in plain English so you approve or undo with full context.

projects.title: article-writing-skills
projects.description: Article, blog, and paper writing prompts and Claude skills modelled on famous engineers and researchers. Works with Claude Code, ChatGPT, Gemini, and any LLM.

projects.title: nip
projects.description: A local-first CLI code agent powered by Gemma. Reads, writes, and refactors code on your machine using a ReAct agent loop with tool-calling capabilities.

projects.title: BG Remover AI
projects.description: A fast, private, serverless AI background removal tool that runs entirely in the browser using ONNX models. No uploads, no tracking.

projects.title: MERN MCP
projects.description: An open-source MCP server that automates full-stack CRUD scaffolding for MERN apps, from database models to React components with a preview-before-apply workflow.

projects.title: Mars Snap
projects.description: A shader-driven procedural Mars landscape generator with atmosphere, fog, shadows, and filmic lighting. Exports wallpaper-quality PNGs.

projects.title: Short Video Subtitle Automation
projects.description: An automated pipeline for generating and burning word-level subtitles into short-form videos using local speech-to-text with whisper.cpp.

projects.title: EnviroConfig
projects.description: A flexible Node.js package for managing environment configurations with schema validation, defaults, and multi-environment support.

projects.title: ProPassword
projects.description: A privacy-first, client-side password generator with phrase-based generation, entropy analysis, and multi-language support.

projects.title: Ayah Daily
projects.description: A tiny, fast, and distraction-free web app that displays one randomly selected Quran ayah each day. Supports 11 languages with no ads or tracking.

projects.title: node-express-rate-limiter
projects.description: An Express.js rate limiting middleware with customizable rules, IP whitelisting, Redis support, and burst handling.

projects.title: vue3-counter
projects.description: A highly customizable numeric counter component for Vue 3 with flexible layouts, styling options, and TypeScript support.

projects.title: macOS Portfolio
projects.description: A portfolio website designed with a macOS-inspired aesthetic, built with modern web technologies.
